name: vmprint
description: Deterministic typesetting engine for the programmable web. Pure-JS, zero-browser document composition with bit-perfect PDF output.
author: cosmiciron

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=contracts && npm run build --workspace=engine && npm run build --workspace=contexts/pdf && npm run build --workspace=font-managers/local && npm run build --workspace=cli && npm run build --workspace=draft2final
